sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for this fighting game

special_mechanics.name: Super Move
special_mechanics.description: Pressing all three buttons simultaneously performs a character-specific super move

special_mechanics.name: Power Pill
special_mechanics.description: Power-up that temporarily increases player strength and reduces damage taken

special_mechanics.name: Character Differentiation
special_mechanics.description: Three playable characters (Buzz, Ty, Kato) have different speeds and powers. Buzz: strong wrestler, Ty: agile kickboxer, Kato: quick martial artist

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. This is a 1-on-1 fighting game using digitized live-action sprites, not a platformer. No jump physics, gravity, or movement speed parameters documented in available sources. Game mechanics focus on combat (punch/kick) rather than player traversal physics.
